reference: Hello, I have severe pain in the wing area of my left arm and my left shoulder. I can't feel any pain if I touch my muscle. I have an ulcer in my stomach and have been taking Nexium thirty milligrams for two months. Sometimes the pain is intolerable. I had an electrocardiogram last week, but it was normal as well. I'm a bit worried. Can you please provide any help?
text: Hello, I have severe pain in the wing area of my left arm and my left shoulder. I can't feel any pain if I touch my muscle. I have an ulcer in my stomach, and I've been taking Nexium 30 mg for 2 months. Sometimes the pain is intolerable. I had an electrocardiogram last week, but it was normal as well. I'm a bit worried; can you please provide any help?
